items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures climb with Fed, Big Tech earnings, Trump-Xi meeting ahead

items.title: Stock Futures Rise Ahead of Mag 7 Earnings, Fed Decision

items.title: Earnings, Trade War and Other Can't Miss Items this Week
items.description: This week brings an extraordinary convergence of market-moving events: Wednesday's virtually certain Fed rate cut and a blockbuster earnings lineup featuring all five mega-cap tech giants
